mapper.sql: portfolio_id, email, category, title, summary, content, work_start_at, work_end_at, is_public, banner_file_id, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted, deleted_at

ORDER BY
portfolio_id
title
category
created_at
updated_at
created_at
${pageRequest.safeDirection}, portfolio_id DESC

sql.if: AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.keyword}, '%') OR summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition.keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM portfolio WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM portfolio WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM portfolio WHERE email = #{email} AND is_public = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM portfolio_profile pp WHERE pp.freelancer_email = portfolio.email AND pp.is_portfolio_public = 1 )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM portfolio WHERE email = #{email} AND is_public = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM portfolio_profile pp WHERE pp.freelancer_email = portfolio.email AND pp.is_portfolio_public = 1 )

SELECT
FROM portfolio WHERE email = #{email} AND is_public = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM portfolio_profile pp WHERE pp.freelancer_email = portfolio.email AND pp.is_portfolio_public = 1 ) ORDER BY created_at DESC, portfolio_id DESC

SELECT
FROM portfolio WHERE portfolio_id = #{portfolioId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT email FROM portfolio WHERE portfolio_id = #{portfolioId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO portfolio ( email, category, title, summary, content, work_start_at, work_end_at, is_public, banner_file_id ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{category}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{workStartAt}, #{workEndAt}, #{isPublic}, #{bannerFileId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE portfolio SET category = #{dto.category}, title = #{dto.title}, summary = #{dto.summary}, content = #{dto.content}, work_start_at = #{dto.workStartAt}, work_end_at = #{dto.workEndAt}, is_public = #{dto.isPublic}, banner_file_id = #{dto.bannerFileId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE portfolio_id = #{portfolioId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE portfolio SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE portfolio_id = #{portfolioId} AND is_deleted = 0
